Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Experiencing student life for myself today has broadened my perspective of your world.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I'd very much appreciate it if you could accompany me again sometime.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}To be honest... I don't entirely understand my own motives for coming here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}But as I walked closely with you, I... How should I express this...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Perhaps... what I really wanted to learn at school was more about you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}In any case, discovering the reason for this desire will surely serve as an intriguing diversion.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}Let us return now. Thank you, once again, for acting as my guide.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I returned to the Velvet Room with Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}
